mapper.select: SELECT ci.id, ci.cart_id, ci.product_id, ci.quantity, ci.created_at, ci.updated_at, p.product_name, p.price, p.stock_quantity FROM cart_item ci JOIN products p ON ci.product_id = p.id WHERE ci.cart_id = #{cartId}

SELECT ci.id, ci.cart_id, ci.product_id, ci.quantity, ci.created_at, ci.updated_at, p.product_name, p.price, p.stock_quantity FROM cart_item ci JOIN products p ON ci.product_id = p.id WHERE ci.id = #{id}

SELECT ci.id, ci.cart_id, ci.product_id, ci.quantity, ci.created_at, ci.updated_at, p.product_name, p.price, p.stock_quantity FROM cart_item ci JOIN products p ON ci.product_id = p.id WHERE ci.cart_id = #{cartId} AND ci.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carts (member_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO cart_item (cart_id, product_id, quantity, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{cartId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM cart_item WHERE id IN
#{id}
